TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit RedisData extends Azure.ResourceManager.Models.TrackedResourceData implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Redis.RedisData>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Redis.RedisData>
Public Class RedisData Inherits TrackedResourceData Implements IJsonModel(Of RedisData), IPersistableModel(Of RedisData)
type RedisData = class inherit TrackedResourceData interface IJsonModel<RedisData> interface IPersistableModel<RedisData>

Docs.summary: A class representing the Redis data model. A single Redis item in List or Get Operation.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(valuetype Azure.Core.AzureLocation location, class Azure.ResourceManager.Redis.Models.RedisSku sku) cil managed
Public Sub New (location As AzureLocation, sku As RedisSku)

Docs.param: The SKU of the Redis cache to deploy.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property AccessKeys As RedisAccessKeys

Docs.summary: The keys of the Redis cache - not set if this object is not the response to Create or Update redis cache.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property EnableNonSslPort As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.EnableNonSslPort : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Specifies whether the non-ssl Redis server port (6379) is enabled.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property HostName As String

Docs.summary: Redis host name.
The identity of the resource.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Instances As IReadOnlyList(Of RedisInstanceDetails)

Docs.summary: List of the Redis instances associated with the cache.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property IsAccessKeyAuthenticationDisabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsAccessKeyAuthenticationDisabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Authentication to Redis through access keys is disabled when set as true. Default value is false.

MemberSignature.Value: protected override void JsonModelWriteCore (System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, System.ClientModel.Primitives.ModelReaderWriterOptions options);

Protected Overrides Sub JsonModelWriteCore (writer As Utf8JsonWriter, options As ModelReaderWriterOptions)

Docs.param: The client options for reading and writing models.
Docs.summary: To be added.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property LinkedServers As IReadOnlyList(Of SubResource)

Docs.summary: List of the linked servers associated with the cache.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property MinimumTlsVersion As Nullable(Of RedisTlsVersion)

Docs.summary: Optional: requires clients to use a specified TLS version (or higher) to connect (e,g, '1.0', '1.1', '1.2').

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Port As Nullable(Of Integer)

Docs.summary: Redis non-SSL port.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property PrivateEndpointConnections As IReadOnlyList(Of RedisPrivateEndpointConnectionData)

Docs.summary: List of private endpoint connection associated with the specified redis cache.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ProvisioningState As Nullable(Of RedisProvisioningState)

Docs.summary: Redis instance provisioning status.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property PublicNetworkAccess As Nullable(Of RedisPublicNetworkAccess)

Docs.summary: Whether or not public endpoint access is allowed for this cache. Value is optional but if passed in, must be 'Enabled' or 'Disabled'. If 'Disabled', private endpoints are the exclusive access method. Default value is 'Enabled'.

All Redis Settings. Few possible keys: rdb-backup-enabled,rdb-storage-connection-string,rdb-backup-frequency,maxmemory-delta, maxmemory-policy,notify-keyspace-events, aof-backup-enabled, aof-storage-connection-string-0, aof-storage-connection-string-1 etc.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.RedisVersion : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Redis version. This should be in the form 'major[.minor]' (only 'major' is required) or the value 'latest' which refers to the latest stable Redis version that is available. Supported versions: 4.0, 6.0 (latest). Default value is 'latest'.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property ReplicasPerMaster As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.ReplicasPerMaster : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The number of replicas to be created per primary.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property ReplicasPerPrimary As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.ReplicasPerPrimary : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The number of replicas to be created per primary.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property ShardCount As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.ShardCount : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The number of shards to be created on a Premium Cluster Cache.
The SKU of the Redis cache to deploy.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property SslPort As Nullable(Of Integer)

Docs.summary: Redis SSL port.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.StaticIP : System.Net.IPAddress with get, set

Docs.summary: Static IP address. Optionally, may be specified when deploying a Redis cache inside an existing Azure Virtual Network; auto assigned by default.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.SubnetId : Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier with get, set

Docs.summary: The full resource ID of a subnet in a virtual network to deploy the Redis cache in. Example format: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/Microsoft.{Network|ClassicNetwork}/VirtualNetworks/vnet1/subnets/subnet1.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property TenantSettings As IDictionary(Of String, String)

Docs.summary: A dictionary of tenant settings.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property UpdateChannel As Nullable(Of UpdateChannel)

Docs.summary: Optional: Specifies the update channel for the monthly Redis updates your Redis Cache will receive. Caches using 'Preview' update channel get latest Redis updates at least 4 weeks ahead of 'Stable' channel caches. Default value is 'Stable'.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Zones As IList(Of String)

Docs.summary: A list of availability zones denoting where the resource needs to come from.
